chapter_title.en: The Minimum Number of Times One Should Go to the Ziyārah of Ĥusain (a.s.) and the Longest Time Allowed to Delay the Ziyārah for the Wealthy and Poor

text: 10 حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي (رحمه الله) عَنْ سَعْدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنِ الْعِيصِ بْنِ الْقَاسِمِ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (ع) هَلْ لِزِيَارَةِ الْقَبْرِ صَلَاةٌ مَفْرُوضَةٌ قَالَ لَيْسَ لَهُ صَلَاةٌ مَفْرُوضَةٌ [شَيْءٌ مَفْرُوضٌ] قَالَ وَ سَأَلْتُهُ فِي كَمْ يَوْمٍ يُزَارُ قَالَ مَا شِئْتَ

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 10. My father narrated to me from Sa’d, from ‘Ali ibn Ismā’īl ibn ‘Isā, from Safwān ibn Yaḥyā, from ‘Ǐs ibn Qāsim, who said: I asked Abā ‘Abdillāh (Imam Sādiq (a.s.)), “Is there an obligatory prayer which should be established after the Ziyārah of the Grave (of Ḥusain (a.s.))?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “There are no obligatory prayers for Ziyārah.” I asked, “How frequently should I go to his Ziyārah?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “As frequently as you wish.”
